productDisplayName: Genesis Men Solid Navy Blue Sweater
description: Composition Blue V-neck cardigan made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, neck and hem, full front buttoned placket, grey and white tipping on the neckline and front placket and a brand badge on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Hand or machine wash in cold water with mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron This blue cardigan from genesis is a classic piece that every man should have in his wardrobe. Complementing both casual and formal wear, this cardigan looks best when worn over a full sleeve shirt and dark hued formal trousers, while the cotton knit fabric offers snug warmth. Model's statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6" and shoulders 18"
